input.hiring_signal_brief: Increased headcount by 12% YoY; no public funding news

candidate_output: Most CTOs don’t realize how slow their hiring is—your pipeline’s probably clogged. We’ve got two engineers who’ve done this exact work. Just say the word and we’ll fix your broken process.
